nasb.text: Sing to the Lord, praise the Lord! For He has delivered the soul of the needy one From the hand of evildoers.

esv.text: Sing to the Lord; praise the Lord! For he has delivered the life of the needy from the hand of evildoers.

cnv.text: 你們要歌頌耶和華， 讚美耶和華； 因為他救了窮乏人的性命， 脫離惡人的手。

ccb.text: 你们要歌颂耶和华！ 要赞美耶和华！ 因为祂从恶人手中救出穷人。
